environment.notes: Python 3.14 venv ships without setuptools; only pip and duckdb are present. pandas/PyArrow/Polars confirmed absent.

expected_results: DuckDB 1.5.4 installs from a binary-only wheel with no source build and no extra dependencies
Synthetic quote/bar -> DuckDB -> Parquet -> DuckDB round trip returns status PASS, deterministic aggregates, equal written/read counts
Research unit tests pass without pandas/PyArrow/Polars; no residual temp files; no personal absolute path in output
Secret scanner reports no findings and governance unit tests pass
make research-check runs the smoke harness and research tests successfully
All three contract schemas and the evidence manifest are valid JSON
No staged or unstaged whitespace errors
CI passes governance, backend, frontend and research-foundation jobs for C1 and C2
actual_results: pip install: 'Successfully installed duckdb-1.5.4' from duckdb-1.5.4-cp314-cp314-macosx_11_0_arm64.whl (binary-only, --no-deps, no pip upgrade)
research_smoke: status PASS; quote_written=quote_read=5, bar_written=bar_read=5; quote_spread_sum=0.0005, bar_close_avg=1.1011, bar_high_max=1.1023; checksums deterministic across runs
research unit tests: Ran 16 tests, OK; pandas/PyArrow/Polars absent; no residual guvfx_research_smoke_* temp dirs; no personal absolute path in printed JSON
check_no_secrets: no findings (exit 0); secret-scanner unit tests OK
make governance-check: passed; make research-check: smoke PASS + 16 research tests OK
json.tool: all three schemas and this manifest parsed as valid JSON
git diff --check and git diff --cached --check produced no output
C1 CI run 28016035520 (head d207c246): governance, backend, frontend, research-foundation all success

Initial C1 push (fcf19983) failed CI as a workflow-parse error: a 'run:' value containing '--only-binary=:all: --no-deps' was read by YAML as a mapping (colon-space at 'all: '); fixed by switching the affected research-foundation steps to block scalars ('run: |') and the C1 commit was amended to d207c246, which passes
limitations: Synthetic data only: no provider, NAS, broker identity, account, real EURUSD price, or ingestion pipeline was added or accessed.
Provider, broker, account, NAS path, granularity and date interval remain Open per ADR 0010; they are not chosen in this packet.
Full JSON-Schema validation via a validator library was not run (no validator installed); a local validator in tools/research_smoke.py enforces the contract rules exercised by the tests.
head_commit/c1_commit and the CI block are filled at the C2 evidence-only commit after the C1 push run concludes success; the C2 commit triggers a second CI run validated separately.
make check (full backend/frontend integration) was not run locally per packet instruction; GitHub Actions is the approved full integration gate.
The local .venv-research is git-ignored and never staged; only its versions/package list are recorded here, with no paths or user data.
